title: WildfireLogPayload
description: Schema for a forwarded PAN-OS WildFire submission log entry. WildFire logs record the results of file analysis by the WildFire cloud-based sandbox malware analysis service, providing verdicts and analysis report links for detected threats.

receive_time.description: Timestamp when the WildFire log entry was received by Strata Logging Service.

serial.description: Serial number of the Palo Alto Networks device that submitted the file to WildFire and generated this log entry.

type.description: Log type identifier, always WILDFIRE for WildFire log entries.

src.description: Source IP address of the session from which the file was captured.

dst.description: Destination IP address of the session from which the file was captured.

app.description: Application identified by App-ID in the session from which the file was captured.

filename.description: Name of the file that was submitted to WildFire for analysis.

filetype.description: File type of the submitted file (e.g., PE, PDF, APK, Adobe Flash, Microsoft Office, script, Java Applet).

file_hash.description: SHA-256 cryptographic hash of the submitted file, used as the unique file identifier in the WildFire cloud database.

file_size.description: Size of the submitted file in bytes.

verdict.description: WildFire analysis verdict for the submitted file indicating whether it is benign, malicious malware, potentially unwanted grayware, a phishing document, or pending analysis completion.

action.description: Action applied to the file by the WildFire security profile based on the analysis verdict.

report_url.description: URL to the full WildFire analysis report in the Palo Alto Networks WildFire portal, providing detailed behavioral analysis results.

src_user.description: Source user identity if User-ID is enabled.

rule_name.description: Name of the security policy rule under which the file was captured and submitted to WildFire.

device_name.description: Hostname of the firewall that captured the file and generated this WildFire log entry.

vsys.description: Virtual system name or identifier on the firewall.

log_forwarding_profile.description: Name of the log forwarding profile that forwarded this log entry.

output_format.description: Output format in which this log entry was forwarded.
